## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [15 new articles generated; 9 ready for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Content publishing process established: immediate posting, author attribution pending](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Brand guidelines updated; focus on improving AI-generated introductions](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Workflow transition to Teero's AirOps instance pending, managed by Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Review Process

  - [15 new assignments generated; 9 articles ready for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Nate to review and comment on all articles, even if no changes needed](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [URL in Airtable shows competitor content used for keyword generation](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [New Airtable tab to be created for Nate to submit blog post ideas](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Content Publishing Strategy

  - [Two calibration articles to be published by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Future articles to be published immediately upon completion](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Author attribution: Initially Nate for first two, then alternating between Nate and Christian](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Team to set up author profiles in CMS for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### Brand Guidelines and Content Quality

  - [Updated guidelines shared, including specific rules for introductions](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [AI struggles with intros, tends to use fluffy language](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Aida manually edits and refines all AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### Workflow and Tools

  - [Airtable used for content management and review in the interim](https://fathom.video/share/2ARyU9giw1uqt7Zx13Nz_eXJ7QmsP5gE?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Meeting Logistics
